display.name: Clear the Ridge Cut
display.short_description: A ridge trail above the hamlet keeps feeding carrion crews onto the road. The board wants one marked scavenger run down.

rules.briefing_text: A scavenger pack leader keeps cutting down from the ridge path. Hunt the marked threat and the hamlet will pay in practical road gear.
rules.accepted_text: The ridge mark is live now. Run the target down, then return here for payment.
rules.completed_text: The ridge path is quiet again. Choose one hamlet reward before you move on.
rules.claimed_text: The ridge board is already crossed clean. This request is settled.
